⚠️ **Do not report security vulnerabilities here.**

Please follow the responsible disclosure process in [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) and email **security@payrollrails.dev** directly.

Public issues are visible to everyone. Reporting a vulnerability here before a fix is available puts all users at risk.

---

If this is a non-sensitive security question (e.g. asking about recommended key management practices), you may proceed below.
